image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about prebiotics.
Context visual: Prebiotics are types of fiber that feed your good gut bacteria.
Escalation visual: Without them, your microbiome can struggle, leading to digestive issues.
Evidence visual: Studies show prebiotics can improve gut health and boost immunity.
Payoff visual: But here's the twist: not all prebiotics are created equal!
Pattern Interrupt visual: Some early research suggests that the wrong types can actually cause bloating.
Cta visual: Want to unlock the secrets of gut health? Follow for more insights!
